slang-base.description: General Slang compiler coworker (base template for all Slang specialists)

slang-ir.description: Slang IR specialist — intermediate representation, passes, and transformations

slang-frontend.description: Slang frontend specialist — lexer, parser, type checking, semantic analysis

slang-cuda.description: Slang CUDA backend specialist — CUDA code generation and GPU features

slang-optix.description: Slang OptiX backend specialist — ray tracing shader compilation

slang-langfeat.description: Slang language feature implementer — end-to-end feature development across all pipeline stages

slang-docs.description: Slang documentation writer — user guides, API reference, stdlib docs

slang-coverage.description: Slang test coverage analyst — coverage reports, gap identification, test writing

slang-test.description: Slang test infrastructure specialist — test harness, writing and debugging tests
